title: Playground Object Ledger
concept: A saved-object control center that treats temporary, browser-saved, local-directory, imported, exported, saving, and deleted Playgrounds as rows in an admin table with a persistent selected-detail panel and protected live preview.
flows: Save an unsaved temporary Playground to browser storage with destination choice, file-copy progress, row transformation, shell title/storage update, and Save & Reload consequence
Save to a local directory with folder-picker permission copy, local-directory identity, and reconnect/reload consequences
Manage saved, unsaved, local, imported, exported, saving, and deleted Playgrounds from table rows with open, rename, manage, delete, confirmation, and fallback state
Create or import from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip routes with their real inputs and replacement constraints
Select a Blueprint from an honestly labeled subset of the 43-entry gallery, inspect JSON, validate, show replacement warning, run progress, and update the active preview and object row
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint bundle, database, logs, export to GitHub, zip download, zip import, and database download while the live shell remains visible
Navigate the active WordPress path, refresh, open Homepage, open WP Admin, and keep path, preview, row state, detail facts, and transfer history in sync
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection and token caveat
Import .zip with native chooser and replacement warning
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and representative subset label for 43 total entries
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission consequences
Delete saved Playground with confirmation and final fallback state
WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, and export tabs
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with copy, download, validate, run, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, size, database.sqlite download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs including a realistic notice
Transfer history for imports, exports, downloads, and replacements
